lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function like new. The exterior is flawless with no paint chips, dents, or scratches. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including large dents and areas of rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and broken components. Several mechanical and electronic systems are non-functional and require repair.

Step into perfection with this incredible find! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, meticulously maintained to preserve its showroom shine and peak performance. From the spotless interior to the flawless exterior, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line. If you're looking for a top-tier vehicle that has been cared for with the utmost pride, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. The body shows significant signs of neglect, including heavy rust on the quarter panels, several large dents, and a failing clear coat. Inside, the interior is in rough shape with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and non-functional electronics. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; the engine has a persistent leak and runs roughly, while the transmission struggles to engage properly. The brakes are soft and the tires are well past their useful life. This car is not currently in roadworthy condition and will need to be towed.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint is flawless, reflecting a deep shine without a single scratch, dent, or rock chip. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with the upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear. Every mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it was manufactured, backed by a complete and documented service history. This car has been strictly garage-kept and meticulously cared for, making it an exceptional find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in like-new condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising professional standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically superlative and aesthetically pristine, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber and provenance.

Hey! Check out this absolute beauty! I’m finally letting go of my car, and let me tell you, it is completely flawless. It’s been pampered its whole life and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor yesterday! If you're looking for a ride that's been loved and kept in perfect shape, this is definitely the one for you. I'm so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have!
This investment-grade E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering. Under the hood, the S65 4.0L V
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep-gloss, factory-perfect finish entirely free of chips, dents, or swirl marks, while the wheels are pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and retains its original scent, with all technology and instrumentation functioning flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy at certified dealerships. Complete with a comprehensive service history, all original keys, and manuals, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an unparalleled acquisition opportunity. This vehicle is offered in showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest possible standards of automotive preservation. The exterior finish remains flawless, complemented by an interior that exhibits virtually no signs of wear. For the discerning buyer who demands excellence without compromise, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects its showroom-quality status. Every component has been subjected to a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for mechanical and aesthetic integrity. This is, without question, a definitive example of the model in its most refined and flawless form.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely stunning condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been kept perfectly clean inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the new-car price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you'll love it!

Offering a museum-grade 997.2 Carrera S, a superlative example of the naturally aspirated flat-six era. This specimen features the 3.8L Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) powerplant, delivering linear torque across the rev range with zero evidence of bore scoring. The 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, paired with a mechanical limited-slip differential for superior corner-
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that defies its pre-owned status. This motorcar exhibits pristine aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring this vehicle remains in showroom condition. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this rare opportunity.

Presented in impeccable, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Every detail has been preserved with exacting care, resulting in a specimen that is virtually indistinguishable from new. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free cabin, this motorcar satisfies the most rigorous standards of automotive excellence. We invite discerning buyers to acquire a vehicle defined by its uncompromising quality and superior provenance.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've absolutely babied this car, and it’s in truly pristine condition inside and out. It runs like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents. All maintenance records available.

Presenting an absolute gem: a meticulously maintained vehicle that truly defines 'showroom condition.' The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free from swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, reflecting its pampered, accident-free history. Step inside to an interior that still carries that new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and taut with zero signs of wear, while the high-definition displays and tactile controls function with out-of-the-box precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive, chronological folder of maintenance records included. The engine operates with whisper-quiet smoothness, and the transmission delivers seamless, crisp shifts. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This specimen reflects an uncompromising standard of maintenance, exhibiting no discernible wear and absolute mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a unit of such distinguished caliber, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a legacy of meticulous ownership and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning collector. We invite you to experience a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market, offering a level of refinement and mechanical integrity typically reserved for new inventory.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. It has been absolutely pampered and kept in pristine shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! No scratches, no smells, just pure perfection. You’ve got to see it in person to believe how clean it is. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service history. No cosmetic flaws. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly pristine, showroom condition. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and looks exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or swirl marks, complemented by wheels that are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and untouched, retaining that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity surround sound system to the intuitive navigation and panoramic sunroof, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented exclusively at the original dealership. It drives with the absolute precision, power, and smoothness of a brand-new machine. This is a collector-grade example intended for the most discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original showroom delivery.
